notes.font-family-primary: Geist — geometric sans-serif with humanist touches. Source: aesthetic-brief.md. Load via 'geist' npm package or Google Fonts.
notes.color-background-screen: Canonical #0F0F1A from aesthetic-brief.md; VLM extracted #18181B — use canonical.
notes.color-surface-card: Canonical #1A1A2E from aesthetic-brief.md; VLM extracted #21232E — use canonical.
notes.color-surface-elevated: Canonical #242438 from aesthetic-brief.md; VLM extracted #2D2F39 — use canonical.
notes.color-accent-primary: Canonical #FF6B35 from aesthetic-brief.md — sole interactive accent, used for Fetch button, active tab.
notes.color-border-dropzone: rgba(255,255,255,0.12) per aesthetic-brief.md — dashed drop-zone border.
notes.radius-lg: 14px — bottom sheet top corners, mini player. Per aesthetic-brief.md. VLM estimated 24px — use canonical.
